description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. She has shoulder-length, straight hair with bangs framing her face. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted tank top and a pair of high-cut briefs, both of which are form-fitting and simple in design. Her facial features are smooth and simplified, with large, expressive eyes and a small nose and mouth. The skin tone is light, and the limbs are proportionate, with visible fingers and toes. The overall appearance is clean and minimalistic, suitable for urban or everyday street scenes.
description: A stylized adult female figure with shoulder-length hair, wearing a sleeveless tank top and high-cut briefs, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, tank top, and high-cut briefs, with arms extended and legs together.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the side contour of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the tank top, and briefs, with arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the face, hair, and body outline.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted tank top and high-cut briefs
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
